Project.NAME: ai-steward-wiki
Project.keywords: telegram, claude-code, wiki, multi-user, classifier, scheduler, sqlite, alembic, aiogram, async
Project.annotation: Isolated multi-user Telegram service that wraps Claude Code CLI as a personal WIKI assistant (Karpathy LLM Wiki method). Foundation chunk: settings, structured logging, three-DB storage scaffold (jobs/audit/sessions), users.toml allowlist + SIGHUP/watchdog hot-reload.

M-FOUNDATION-SETTINGS.NAME: Settings
M-FOUNDATION-SETTINGS.purpose: Pydantic-settings BaseSettings (frozen) loaded from .env with AISW_ prefix.

type-Settings.PURPOSE: Frozen BaseSettings: log_level, workspace_root, claude_config_dir_local/_vps (resolved by env), *_db_url

type-LogLevel.PURPOSE: Literal alias for accepted log levels

M-FOUNDATION-LOGGING.NAME: Logging
M-FOUNDATION-LOGGING.purpose: structlog JSON-lines logging with correlation_id contextvar propagation.

fn-configure_logging.PURPOSE: One-shot structlog setup, JSON renderer, ISO UTC timestamps

fn-bind_correlation_id.PURPOSE: Set the correlation_id contextvar; returns Token

fn-reset_correlation_id.PURPOSE: Reset via Token returned from bind_correlation_id

M-AUTH-USERS.NAME: Auth / Users
M-AUTH-USERS.purpose: users.toml SSoT allowlist with SIGHUP+watchdog hot-reload and sessions.db sync (D-031, D-042).

type-UserRecord.PURPOSE: Frozen Pydantic model for one [[users]] entry

type-AllowlistReloader.PURPOSE: Guarded async reload coroutine; sha256 short-circuit

fn-replace_global.PURPOSE: Atomic swap of module-level allowlist cache

fn-sync_to_sessions_db.PURPOSE: Upsert + soft-disable for users absent from config

M-STORAGE.NAME: Storage barrel
M-STORAGE.purpose: Storage package root; re-exports apply_sqlite_pragmas plus SQLite PRAGMA listener.

fn-apply_sqlite_pragmas.PURPOSE: Attach connect-listener that sets WAL, synchronous=NORMAL, foreign_keys=ON, busy_timeout=5000

M-STORAGE-JOBS.NAME: Storage / jobs.db
M-STORAGE-JOBS.purpose: Async engine + ORM models + Pydantic discriminated union for jobs.db (D-002, D-006, D-014, D-019).

type-Job.PURPOSE: Row in jobs.jobs (flat columns + JSON payload)

M-STORAGE-AUDIT.NAME: Storage / audit.db
M-STORAGE-AUDIT.purpose: Append-only audit + dedup + observability for audit.db (D-006 amended 2026-05-10).

M-STORAGE-SESSIONS.NAME: Storage / sessions.db
M-STORAGE-SESSIONS.purpose: Runtime TG state and hot-path caches for sessions.db (D-006, D-031, D-042, D-030, D-023).

type-InboxHintCache.PURPOSE: Per-user runtime catalog of '## Inbox hint'

M-RUNTIME-WIRING.NAME: Runtime wiring / __main__
M-RUNTIME-WIRING.purpose: Process entrypoint (python -m ai_steward_wiki). Composes Settings, per-DB alembic migrations, engines, allowlist sync, APScheduler, aiogram Bot+Dispatcher; runs long-polling with graceful SIGINT/SIGTERM shutdown.
M-RUNTIME-WIRING.depends: M-FOUNDATION-SETTINGS, M-FOUNDATION-LOGGING, M-AUTH-USERS, M-STORAGE-JOBS, M-STORAGE-AUDIT, M-STORAGE-SESSIONS

fn-_sync_url_for_jobstore.PURPOSE: strip aiosqlite driver from URL for SQLAlchemyJobStore

fn-_ensure_data_dirs.PURPOSE: mkdir parents for sqlite file URLs

fn-_run_all_migrations.PURPOSE: alembic upgrade head per-DB via asyncio.to_thread

fn-_load_users_config.PURPOSE: load users.toml or return empty config when path missing

M-TG-HANDLERS-WIRING.NAME: Telegram handlers wiring
M-TG-HANDLERS-WIRING.purpose: Compose aiogram Router (text/voice/photo/document/callback) into Dispatcher; thin handlers delegate to a MessagePipeline that performs L1 idempotency dedup, optional voice/photo staging, ack delivery, and confirmation callback resolution. Building blocks unchanged.
M-TG-HANDLERS-WIRING.depends: M-TG-TEXT, M-INBOX, M-TG-CONFIRM, M-TG-VOICE, M-TG-PHOTO, M-RUNTIME-WIRING

fn-build_router.PURPOSE: factory wiring 5 aiogram handlers to MessagePipeline

fn-DefaultPipeline.PURPOSE: concrete coordinator: L1 dedup, optional stage, ack send, confirm resolve

fn-MessagePipeline.PURPOSE: Protocol with 5 entry points used by handlers

M-CLAUDE-CLI-COMMON.NAME: ClaudeCliCommon
M-CLAUDE-CLI-COMMON.purpose: Pure-function primitives shared by Stage-0 (classifier) and Stage-1 (wiki) Claude CLI backends.

fn-build_env.PURPOSE: restricted env dict (CLAUDE_CONFIG_DIR + minimal PATH) for CLI subprocess

fn-neutral_cwd.PURPOSE: working directory that does NOT auto-discover project CLAUDE.md

fn-system_prompt_argv.PURPOSE: flag fragment --system-prompt-file <path> replacing default Claude Code system prompt

fn-truncate_stderr.PURPOSE: UTF-8 decode + length cap for error log lines

CrossLink.relation: syncs users.toml snapshot to sessions.users table
